name: Emtricitabine
summary: Approved nucleoside reverse transcriptase inhibitor being tested in Alzheimer disease and mild cognitive impairment as a repurposed strategy to inhibit reverse-transcriptase-linked inflammatory biology.
mechanism_summary: Inhibits reverse transcriptase activity; in this track, the hypothesized aging-adjacent target is endogenous retroelement or genomic cDNA-linked immune activation rather than HIV replication.

open_questions: Whether emtricitabine changes inflammatory, Alzheimer, or retroelement-linked biomarkers in controlled MCI or Alzheimer disease studies
Whether any biomarker change is tied to direct transposable-element target engagement
Whether chronic use has acceptable safety and resistance-context boundaries in older non-HIV populations
